case_title: SHKOLNIKOV SOFIA VS RUSSART,INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSART,INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24320, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHKOLNIKOV SOFIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSART,INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION GROUP VOYAGERS INC DBA COSMOS, TOURAMA,COSMOS TOURAMA, A NEW YORK CORPORATION $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,527.00, SEE CONSOLIDATION ORDER IN CASE #751541. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT RUSSART,INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION GROUP VOYAGERS INC DBA COSMOS, TOURAMA,COSMOS TOURAMA, A NEW YORK CORPORATION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,710.88 FILED BY SHKOLNIKOV SOFIA AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSART,INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION GROUP VOYAGERS INC DBA COSMOS, TOURAMA,COSMOS TOURAMA, A NEW YORK CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHKOLNIKOV SOFIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RUSSART,INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24320 ON 9-11-96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
